title: Baked British Fish with Malt Glaze and Chips
description: A classic British dish with a French twist, featuring baked fish, a malty glaze, and crispy chips.

ingredients.name: fish
ingredients.notes: white fish like cod or tilapia

instructions: Season the fish with salt, pepper, and thyme.
Place the fish on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle the malt vinegar over the fish and sprinkle with malt.
Bake the fish for 12-15 minutes or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, heat about 2 inches of oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (175°C).
Fry the chips in batches until crispy and golden brown.
Drain the chips on paper towels.
Serve the fish with the chips and a side of eggplant if desired.
Garnish with fresh herbs if possible.
